reviews.review_description: Great idea, unfortunately the audio is unlistenable. Which makes it pretty much unusable, as sound is its main function! It sounds garbled, like there is a problem with the latency settings. I have experienced this with another app that was free. It's disappointing that this problem hasn't been rectified, as it's a paid app.

Don't get me wrong this is a great idea it's fun but the multiplayer lacks well everything... you can't see people who you're with in the room the talk function is just blank and you have to restart the app if you click it so it's pretty much useless other than that the solo play is kinda good can make some decent sounding music!
Really, composing electronic music with that, i like trying to write a poem with 5 words.

reviews.review_title: Bad sound and freezes in Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: It's a shame that you sell a sound app that sounds bad and freezes while you're using it. I would like my money back because it is useless. Don't waste your money!
On a Samsung S7, sound becomes choppy with a single instrument and everything becomes laggy and completely unusable if you add drums.

Take this review for what its worth - i'm not terrifically into this kinda music and have never used a creator tool like this before but I do believe it is a cool little bit of kit. Its rather easy to pick up and learn and its hard to make a tune sound significantly bad so i'm having fun with it. Don't expect an advanced music creator and editor though - compared to a loy of tools i've seen this mat as well be a toy. Also I wish they would of made use of the VR mode but as it stands - yes i'm having fun with it.
Crazy static when you have just a few different sounds
Tus beatiful but the sound is very bud....scratch noise

I've been a professional music producer for over 30 years and am completely blown away by what this vr experience makes available to it's users!!
A live electronica jam session with up to 3 people in endless possibilies of musical Bliss!!
The potential in this app blows my mind! Can't believe I haven't heard of it anywhere in the industry!
Excellent!! Keep developing it please! :-o
C'est un très bon programme mais le son est toujours problématique y a-t-il un moyen de le 'updater' merci ...

Interesting idea, but not completely original, and pretty light in features.

But the reason for the single star is the sound quality, which is awful. Crackles and distortion at whatever volume. The device is playing other music fine.

Finally I feel a little cheated, in that I'd assumed that this "Soundscape" was related to "Soundscape VR", which I've heard good things of. But it appears to be nothing to do with it.
I can see the potential, but audio is laggy and scratchy. Hire somebody who can program, please.
